requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire-Safety and Local Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全与当地安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全與當地安裝審查

summary.en: Swiss BESS installations commonly require local review by municipal building services, cantonal fire office, insurer, and project owner in addition to CE-aligned technical documentation. Swiss authorities usually do not publish a single mandatory nationwide stand-alone national BESS fire certificate; acceptance is handled through site-specific fire dossier review in the project pathway.
summary.zh: 瑞士BESS安装通常在CE对齐技术文件之外还需经过当地市政建筑服务、州/州际消防部门、保险方和项目业主的审查。瑞士通常不会发布单一、必备的全国性BESS专属消防证书，通常通过项目路径下的现场消防资料包进行接受。
summary.zht: 瑞士BESS安裝通常在CE對齊技術文件之外還需經過當地市政建築服務、州/州際消防部門、保險方和項目業主的審查。瑞士通常不會發布單一必備的全國性BESS專屬消防證書，通常通過項目路徑下的現場消防資料包進行接受。

standards_or_laws: Cantonal fire-prevention and building-coordination requirements where applicable
Local fire office, municipality, insurer, and project-owner fire-safety review

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558 plus project fire-design review for stationary energy storage. These documents can support Swiss-side preparation but do not replace Swiss municipal or cantonal fire dossier and local authority expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及项目消防设计审查进行固定式储能评估。这些文件可用于瑞士端准备，但不能替代瑞士地方消防资料包和当地主管部门要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及項目消防設計審查進行固定式儲能評估。這些文件可用於瑞士端準備，但不能取代瑞士地方消防資料包和當地主管部門要求。

gap.en: Prepare a Swiss site-specific fire dossier with installation class, thermal runaway mitigation, fire detection and suppression layout, ventilation and gas-management strategy, spacing, access route, emergency shutdown, runoff and contamination controls where relevant, commissioning tests, and multilingual emergency instructions matching the Swiss project team.
gap.zh: 应准备瑞士特定站点的消防资料包，包括安装类别、热失控抑制、消防探测与灭火布局、通风与气体治理方案、间距、通道、紧急停机、适用时的消防废水和污染控制、调试测试及与瑞士项目团队一致的多语言应急说明。
gap.zht: 應準備瑞士特定站點的消防資料包，包括安裝類別、熱失控抑制、消防偵測與滅火佈局、通風與氣體治理方案、間距、通道、緊急停機、適用時的消防廢水與污染控制、調試測試及與瑞士項目團隊一致的多語言應急說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where local authorities, municipality, insurer, and project owner require site acceptance; no national single-purpose BESS fire certificate is stated as a general statutory shortcut.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific for Chinese domestic review; Chinese fire reports are not direct Swiss municipality or cantonal acceptance proof.

source.publisher: Swiss Federal and cantonal safety/regulatory bodies

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product fire reports are not a standalone Swiss site-acceptance basis. Include local dossier files for cantonal fire and municipal coordination before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [INFORMATIONAL] 产品消防报告不能作为瑞士现场验收的独立依据。应在投运前补充当地消防和市政协调资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [INFORMATIONAL] 產品消防報告不能作為瑞士現場驗收的獨立依據。應在投運前補充當地消防和市政協調資料包。
